allow: Bash(node -e "const {Pool} = require\('pg'\); const p = new Pool\({connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL || 'postgresql://localhost/test'}\); p.query\('SELECT 1'\).then\(\(\)=>console.log\('ok'\)\).catch\(e=>console.error\('db error:',e.message\)\).finally\(\(\)=>p.end\(\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**p.get\('dependencies',{}\), **p.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if any\(x in k for x in ['gemini','google','genkit','openai','anthropic','ai']\)]")
